craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *This is a Monthly Price, Plus Tax Experience Hassle-Free Living with Our No-Lease, No-Deposit Policy! WELCOME TO THE BEST APARTMENT ALTERNATIVE IN THE AREA! Our all-inclusive pricing helps you save money every month, with the option to pay weekly or monthly. Enjoy the freedom of no lease, no deposit, and no credit check, allowing you to move in and out at your convenience. Amenities Include: Save hundreds every month! Take a tour to see why we are different and better! No Deposit - Check-in any time Flexible Payment Plans - Pay weekly or monthly Free Wi-Fi & Cable No Lease - Check out on your schedule Free Utilities - Electric, A/C & Heat Various Studio Layouts; Choose what's right for you! On-site staff available 24/7 for emergencies Dog friendly - We love your fur babies! Full Kitchens - Save $money$ by cooking your own meals Under-bed storage for extra space and organizatio Our dedicated staff is on-site around the clock, and the property features 24/7 key-controlled access for your safety and convenience. We are proud to be pet-friendly, welcoming up to two dogs under 50 lbs. (pet fee applies). Book Your Stay Today! Experience the best value in Arnold! Contact Us Now: Call or email us to reserve your spot! Limited-Time Offer for New Guests Only! Call: show contact info Pricing and availability are subject to change daily.
